settings.text:
UrbanStudio Nails was created for the modern woman—busy, ambitious, stylish, and always on the move.

We believe beauty should fit your life, not slow it down. Traditional salon visits are expensive and time-consuming, while cheap mass-produced press-ons never look or feel like the real thing.

So we set out to create a better option.

Inspired by the energy of urban life and the elegance of minimal, modern aesthetics, UrbanStudio Nails transforms hand-crafted press-ons into wearable art.

Each set is shaped, designed, and finished by hand—giving you the look of a fresh salon manicure in minutes, with the quality and individuality you deserve.
We design for women who express themselves through style.Women who love effortless beauty.

Women who know that confidence starts with the small details.
Our promise is simple:premium handmade nails that elevate your everyday life—anytime, anywhere.
Whether you’re heading to work, a date night, a weekend getaway, or simply want to feel a little more “you,” UrbanStudio Nails is here to help you look polished, empowered, and uniquely beautiful.

This is more than press-on nails.

This is your story, your style, your confidence—crafted by hand.

settings.heading: Why Handmade Matters
settings.text:
Handmade Craftsmanship, Elevated✨

Each UrbanStudio Nails set is individually crafted by hand—never mass-produced.

Our artists shape, paint, and finish every detail with precision, ensuring the quality, durability, and beauty that machine-made press-ons can’t achieve.

From soft pearls to holographic finishes, every element is selected with care and attached by hand, giving you a salon-perfect look with true artisanal value.

UrbanStudio Nails isn’t just nail art.

It’s craftsmanship you can feel the moment you wear it.

settings.heading: Designed for Your Lifestyle
settings.text:
Beauty That Fits Your Life✨

We design nails for real life—fast mornings, busy schedules, special nights out, and everything in between.

Our press-ons apply in minutes and stay flawless for days, giving you salon-quality beauty without the cost or time commitment.

Whether you love bold glam, clean minimalism, or soft feminine styles, each collection lets you express your personal style effortlessly.

UrbanStudio Nails exists to make beauty easy, flexible, and uniquely yours.

settings.heading: Our Quality Promise
settings.text:
Our Commitment to Quality✨

We use premium materials—professional-grade gel, long-lasting top coats, strong adhesive tabs, and cruelty-free embellishments—to ensure every set meets our quality standards.

Every piece is inspected before shipping to guarantee smooth edges, secure decorations, and a flawless finish.

We stand behind our work.

If your nails arrive with any issue, our team will make it right—because you deserve beauty without compromise.
